description_long: This object is a rectangular fax machine with a boxy, utilitarian design, featuring a combination of light gray and darker gray panels. The front side displays a vented or slatted section, likely for cooling or speaker output, and a control panel area with buttons and possibly a small display, though details are partially obscured. A red accent, possibly a handle or part of the paper tray, is visible along the lower edge, adding a touch of color contrast. The top surface appears flat, with a possible paper input tray or feeder, and the rear and sides are mostly plain with some panel lines and minor detailing. The overall construction suggests a plastic exterior with internal metal components for structural support and electronics. The object is compact, suitable for placement on a desk or counter in an office or urban environment.
description: A compact, rectangular fax machine with gray panels, a vented front section, and a red accent along the lower edge. The top is flat, and the design is utilitarian with visible control elements.
description_view_0: This view shows the top and partial front of the fax machine, highlighting the flat upper surface and the red accent along the lower edge.
description_view_1: The left side and front are visible, with the vented panel and some control elements more apparent.
description_view_2: The rear and right side are shown, with less detail and mostly plain surfaces visible.
description_view_3: This angle reveals the right side and top, with the red accent and some panel lines visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front upper section, with buttons arranged in a grid or row, and a possible small display screen above or beside the buttons. The controls are grouped together for easy access.
attribute_paper_tray_design: The paper tray is located at the top or rear, with a flat orientation and a red accent, possibly serving as a handle or guide. The tray appears to be able to hold a small stack of paper.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is positioned at the front lower section, just above the red accent, with a possible guide or tray to catch printed paper.
attribute_handset_attachment: A handset cradle is visible on the side, with the handset likely attached via a cord, though the cord itself is not clearly visible.
